name: send_email
description: Send a transactional or marketing email to one or more recipients. Supports HTML and plain text bodies, file attachments, inline images, custom headers, tracking options, and scheduled delivery. You can send to up to 1,000 recipients per request.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Your Mailgun sending domain (path parameter). For example: 'mg.example.com'.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Sender email address in 'Name <email>' format or plain email address.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: One or more recipient email addresses. Can include display names.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: The subject line of the email.

parameters.name: html
parameters.description: HTML body of the email. At least one of 'html' or 'text' is required.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Plain text body of the email. At least one of 'html' or 'text' is required.

parameters.name: cc
parameters.description: One or more CC recipient email addresses.

parameters.name: bcc
parameters.description: One or more BCC recipient email addresses.

parameters.name: o:tag
parameters.description: Tags for categorizing emails. Up to 3 tags per message. Useful for filtering events later.

parameters.name: o:tracking
parameters.description: Toggle tracking for this message. Set to 'yes' or 'no'.

parameters.name: o:deliverytime
parameters.description: RFC 2822 date string for scheduled delivery. Messages can be scheduled up to 7 days in advance.

body.subject: Your order has shipped!
body.html:
Hello!

Your order #1234 has shipped and is on its way.
